'''Brad O'Neill''' (born 22 July 2002) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for the [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[Super League]].

==Club career==
===Wigan Warriors===
In 2021 he made his [[Super League]] début for [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]] against [[Wakefield Trinity]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP3543345|title=Super League: Wakefield Trinity v Wigan Warriors|work=BBC Sport}}</ref>

On 28 May 2022, he played for Wigan in their [[2022 Challenge Cup Final]] victory over [[Huddersfield Giants]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/61594770.amp/|title=Challenge Cup final: Huddersfield Giants 14-16 Wigan Warriors|work=BBC Sport|date=26 May 2022 }}</ref>

On 14 October 2023, O'Neill played in Wigan's [[2023 Super League Grand Final]] victory over the [[Catalans Dragons]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2023/oct/14/catalans-dragons-wigan-super-league-grand-final-rugby-league-match-report/|title=Wigan Warriors crowned Super League champions after downing Dragons|newspaper=The Observer|date=14 October 2023 |last1=Bower |first1=Aaron }}</ref>

On 24 February 2024, O'Neill played in Wigan's [[2024 World Club Challenge]] final victory over [[Penrith Panthers]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/68337685|title=World Club Challenge: Wigan Warriors 16-12 Penrith Panthers - Cherry and Whites crowned world champions for fifth time|work=BBC Sport |date=24 February 2024 }}</ref>

On 8 June 2024, O'Neill played in Wigan's [[2024 Challenge Cup final]] victory over [[Warrington Wolves]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/c2jj1x7m71zo|title=Wigan beat Warrington to win Challenge Cup|work=BBC Sport|date=8 June 2024 }}</ref>

In July 2024, O'Neill suffered an [[Anterior cruciate ligament|ACL]] injury, ruling him out for a minimum of nine months.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cx82z1750n3o |title=Brad O'Neill: Wigan Warriors hooker sidelined with ACL injury |work=BBC Sport |date=30 July 2024 }}</ref> He returned to the field in March 2025 and made his way back into the squad in round 6 vs Salford.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/brad-oneill-to-make-wigan-return-this-week-as-jai-field-update-given |title=Brad O'Neill to make Wigan return this week as Jai Field update given |website=Love Rugby League |date=26 March 2025}}</ref>
On 9 October 2025, O'Neill played in Wigan's 24-6 2025 Super League Grand Final loss against Hull Kingston Rovers.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cx2jw497jpzo/|title=Hull KR beat Wigan in Grand Final to complete treble|work=BBC Sport}}</ref>
On 30 May 2026, O'Neill played in Wigan's 2026 Challenge Cup final victory against Hull Kingston Rovers.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2026/jun/01/challenge-cup-crowds-are-dwindling-but-rugby-league-must-save-wembley-relationship|title=Challenge Cup crowds are dwindling but rugby league must save Wembley relationship|website=[[The Guardian]]}}</ref>

==International career==
He made his {{rlnt|England}} début on 29 June 2024 against {{rlnt|France}} in Toulouse.<ref>{{cite web|work=BBC Sport|date=29 June 2024|title=France v England|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP4465137}}</ref>
